summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Softogram website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend responsive with excellent UI/UX. Contact form integration working perfectly.

configuration_notes.impact: Email notifications won't be sent but form submissions work

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle element positioning issue on small viewports

passed_tests: Hero section with animated gradient and CTAs
Navbar with glassmorphism and sticky behavior
Stats section with animated counters (4 stats)
Pricing section with Growth plan marked popular
Footer with links and social icons
